key_moments.description: Bradford admits he did not see the specific strike by Sherry, only the impact.

key_moments.description: Sherry states Captain Yep authorized force 'by whatever means necessary'.

key_moments.transcript_excerpt: I Yawara striked him to zone one, and he fell to the ground.

key_moments.description: Investigator challenges Bradford on whether the subject was 'overtly aggressive'.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: Was the man overtly aggressive is my question.
